Container.Name: CacheDeck
Container.Overview: All-in-one LANCache Steam prefill control plane with an embedded engine, visual game library, persistent queue, schedules, live progress and diagnostics.
Container.Description: CacheDeck v0.8 can run its Steam prefill engine inside the CacheDeck container, removing the requirement for a separate SteamPrefill app. It owns a persistent SQLite catalogue, queue, run history, schedules and structured activity. The older target-container provider remains available for compatibility.
Container.Requires: A working LANCache and Steam DNS redirection. Docker socket access is optional for the embedded provider and is only needed for legacy-provider mode or the one-click import from an old SteamPrefill container.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port used to open the CacheDeck web interface.

Config.Name: Persistent Config
Config.Description: Persistent CacheDeck database, embedded Steam engine data, credentials, logs and schedules.

Config.Name: Prefill Provider
Config.Description: Use embedded-steam for the all-in-one v0.8 engine, or steamprefill to control an existing external container.

Config.Name: Provider Working Directory
Config.Description: Persistent working directory for embedded-steam. Legacy mode normally uses /lancacheprefill/SteamPrefill inside the target container.

Config.Name: Provider Job State Directory
Config.Description: Detached-job PID, exit status and live log directory. Keep this under /config for embedded-steam.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Default timezone used by the embedded engine and schedule display.

Config.Name: Docker Socket (Optional)
Config.Description: Not required by embedded-steam. Add it only for legacy provider mode or importing the selected-game list from an old SteamPrefill container.

Config.Name: Legacy SteamPrefill Container
Config.Description: External SteamPrefill container name used by legacy mode and optional selected-game import.

Config.Name: Legacy SteamPrefill User
Config.Description: Leave blank for embedded-steam. Legacy mode commonly uses prefill.

Config.Name: Automatic Resume
Config.Description: When true, CacheDeck makes one automatic restart attempt after a managed prefill is interrupted.

Config.Name: Allowed Browser Origins
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated browser origins for an authenticated reverse proxy. Same-origin access works without this.

Config.Name: History Limit
Config.Description: Number of completed or detected runs retained in /config.
